message.content: {"items":[{"title":"Consumption in the Household 1966: Interview Study","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA0074","justification":"GESIS household survey from 1966 focusing on consumption patterns, expenditures and consumer behaviour; covers the 1960s period and is directly about consumption behaviour. Although not Finland-specific, it is one of the closest temporal and thematic matches in the GESIS catalogue."},{"title":"Consumption Survey 1969","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA0135","justification":"1969 GESIS survey on consumer expenditures, purchases and attitudes toward consumption. It is squarely within the 1960s and focuses on consumer behaviour; again not confined to Finland but closely aligned with the requested topic in time and theme."},{"title":"Consumer Survey 1964","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA0038","justification":"Mid-1960s survey on consumer attitudes, expenditures and purchase behaviour. While geographic coverage is not Finland-only, it provides detailed 1960s consumer-behaviour data that is methodologically similar to what would be used to study consumption in that era."},{"title":"Consumer Panel 1963–1965","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA0029","justification":"Panel study following households in the early–mid 1960s with repeated measures of purchasing, brand choice and consumption volumes. Strongly relevant for reconstructing 1960s consumer behaviour; geography is broader than Finland, but thematically fits the query."},{"title":"Consumer Survey 1962","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA0019","justification":"Early 1960s survey capturing consumer expenditures and attitudes at the beginning of the decade. Useful for comparative 1960s consumption research, even though it is not Finland-specific."},{"title":"Household Budget Survey 1964/65","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA0045","justification":"Detailed household budget data from 1964–1965 including expenditures by category and some socio-demographic information; provides a consumption profile of the mid‑1960s that is relevant for studying consumer behaviour of that period."},{"title":"Household Budget Survey 1969/70","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA0142","justification":"Late‑1960s/early‑1970s household expenditure survey offering detailed data on spending patterns and consumer choices; useful as an endpoint for 1960s consumption trends analysis despite not being Finland-specific."},{"title":"European Consumer Survey 1962–1963","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA0031","justification":"Cross-national survey of consumers in several European countries in the early 1960s; while it may not include Finland explicitly, it offers comparative European consumption and consumer-attitude data close to the requested context."},{"title":"European Consumer Survey 1967","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA0098","justification":"Mid‑1960s cross-national consumer survey examining purchasing behaviour, brand preferences and consumer confidence. Potentially useful as part of a European comparison for understanding Finland in its regional context, even if Finland is not a separate sample."},{"title":"European Consumer Survey 1969","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA0138","justification":"Late‑1960s European consumer survey with data on expenditures and consumer sentiment. Relevant for contextualising 1960s consumption and consumer behaviour in Europe. As with the others, the dataset is not dedicated to Finland but aligns thematically and temporally with the query."}]}
